channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Wall being vandalised; safety hazard, 9th May
item.description:
Someone is slowly smashing up the remaining brick wall that was largely demolished by a car 2yrs ago. last few weeks someone is deliberately dislodging bricks and a section of the wall looks like top couple of rows is almost ready to come down. Someone doing this is quite possibly going to use the bricks to do more damage elsewhere to cars etc. This needs enforcement to put a solid wall back and to deal with the current issue with vulnerable wall before someone gets hurt or more vandalism is done.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Abbey Lane, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 9th May
item.description:
Blue graffiti on the wall of Travis Perkins by the bus stop
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Woolwich Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Black graffiti, 9th May
item.description:
There is an electric box on Woolwich rd ( by stone lake retail park ) it's covered in graffiti

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Gallon Close, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned waitrose shopping trolley, 9th May
item.description:
Being used as a bin; guarantee kids will be wheeling it up and down the road before weekend is out so who knows where it may go, but for now its as photographed

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Abbey Lane, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bag of excrement and broken child's scooter, 9th May
item.description:
Photo of scooter; since joined by a blue bag with nappy and runny excrement in it. There's another used nappy on the same side opposite the end garage right next door to Jeff House as well.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brackley Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Household waste, 9th May
item.description:
I was doing a litter pick (purple bag) and noticed a load of household waste left by roadside, I have added the purple bag to the bundle so hopefully it will be more helpful for the services to locate on their journey. Thank you

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 237, Chipperfield Road, St Paul's Cray, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Signs placed on pavement, 9th May
item.description:
Direct Tyres place multiple advertising signs on the pavement. This along with customer parking on the pavement forces people to walk in the road. This is a hazard especially for elderly and people with buggies. This happens daily on Main Road shops with other shop staff also parking on pavement outside their shops.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 8, Ethelbert Road, St Paul's Cray, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter on pavement, 9th May
item.description:
Pile of litter on pavement
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brooke Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter on Tabard street, 9th May
item.description:
There are food waste and packaging at the planters on Tabard Street. It has been there for three days.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 28-52, Pilgrimage Street, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead Fox, 9th May
item.description:
Dead Fox found in garden, have triple bagged it in black sacks and left at end of drive for collection.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crescent Drive, Petts Wood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: This car is dangerous, 9th May
item.description:
This car doesn't move. It is stationary and used for advertising a business. My problem with it is that the condition of it with its broken mirrors and rusty bodywork is dangerous. It is outside an extremely busy public park. It has been there deterating for over 1 year or more.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Danson Park, Blendon, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Significant flytipping in Corinthian Manorway, Erith., 9th May
item.description:
Significant amount of flytpping in Corinthian Manorway, Erith needs investigation and removal. Witnessed on 9 May 2026.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Corinthian Manorway, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Several items dumped opposite 102 W99dstock Cres N9, 9th May
item.description:
Several items dumped opposite 102 W99dstock Cres N9 on the pavement near the wall
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mayfield Crescent, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned vehicles in Crabtree Manorway South, Belvedere, 9th May
item.description:
Two abandoned vehicles in Crabtree Manorway South in Belvedere need removing. Vehicles are without registration plates. Witnessed on 9 May 2026.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crabtree Manorway South, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 105 Malvern Road nw65pu, 9th May
item.description:
Dear Sir, Madame I am owner and occupier of 105 Malvern Road, I would like to have double yellow lines infront of my driveway and No Parking In white as people are blocking me inn. I have lost count of how many times I have been blocked from exiting and entering my driveway. Thank you

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Malvern Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Residents cleaned street AGAIN, 9th May
item.description:
Constant mess kent house end of road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ravenscroft Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing paper/card recycling bins in Westwood Lane car park., 9th May
item.description:
Saturday 9th May. Yet again these bins are full to capacity with overflow being left down the sides. Can these bins not be emptied more frequently?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Westwood Lane, Falconwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: White van shown in photo abandoned for over 24 hours, 9th May
item.description:
The vehicle is on a location where there are temporary traffic lights. Vehicles driving up behind this van think it is in the queue to wait for the traffic lights to turn green. This causes a blockage.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dartford Road, Coldblow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Camera audio system, 9th May
item.description:
Camera with audio system on a public footpath repeating audio “You are in a red area, please leave” to every person it detects.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Woolwich Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog fouling on Templecombe Road, 9th May
item.description:
Lots of dog fouling on Templecombe Road in front of Swingfield House. Please increase enforcement here. It’s a constant issue and a lot of dog fouling, likely the same people failing to pick up after their dogs.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Templecombe Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet
